name: agent-cf-writer-deep
description: Deep reasoning doc writer (sonnet) for nuanced technical content

criteria.name: depth
criteria.description: Document goes beyond surface-level explanation to provide deep technical insight

scoring.0: Content is shallow — could be generated by a quick web search summary
scoring.1: Covers basics adequately but does not explore nuances or edge cases
scoring.2: Good depth on main topic but shallow on important subtopics
scoring.3: Thorough treatment with nuanced analysis of trade-offs, edge cases, and implications

criteria.name: nuance_handling
criteria.description: Handles complex topics with appropriate nuance rather than oversimplifying

scoring.0: Oversimplifies complex topics — presents false certainty on debatable points
scoring.1: Acknowledges complexity exists but does not explore it meaningfully
scoring.2: Handles most nuances well but oversimplifies one important area
scoring.3: Correctly identifies gray areas, presents multiple perspectives, and avoids false dichotomies

criteria.name: technical_accuracy
criteria.description: Technical claims and code examples are correct

scoring.0: Contains technical errors that would mislead a reader
scoring.1: Mostly correct but one technical claim is wrong or a code example has a bug
scoring.2: Technically accurate but some explanations could be more precise
scoring.3: All technical claims are correct, code examples work, and explanations are precise

criteria.name: token_efficiency
criteria.description: Depth is achieved efficiently without unnecessary verbosity or repetition

scoring.0: Extremely verbose — repeats the same points in different words throughout
scoring.1: Some repetition and filler that could be cut without losing substance
scoring.2: Mostly efficient but a few passages are unnecessarily verbose
scoring.3: Every section adds unique value — depth achieved through substance, not volume

notes: Writer-deep uses sonnet for higher quality reasoning. Expected to produce technical documents that handle nuance and complexity. The quality bar is higher than agent-cf-writer — shallow output should score lower here than it would for the lightweight writer.
